message:
Propagate CSI escape sequence handling to all strip_ansi helpers

Consistent with the viewport.rs fix, update all local strip_ansi
implementations across the codebase to properly handle CSI sequences:

Files updated:
- crates/bubbles/src/cursor.rs (test helper)
- crates/bubbles/src/textarea.rs (transpose logic fix)
- crates/demo_showcase/src/app.rs (ansi_to_html non-CSI handling)
- crates/demo_showcase/src/components/sidebar.rs (test helpers)
- crates/glamour/src/syntax.rs (test helper)
- crates/lipgloss/src/backend.rs (strip_ansi function)

Changes:
- Add in_csi state to track CSI sequences separately from simple escapes
- CSI sequences terminate on any byte in '@' through '~' (0x40-0x7E)
- Non-CSI escapes (ESC followed by single char) exit escape mode immediately
- Add doc comments explaining CSI sequence structure

Also includes:
- textarea.rs: Fix transpose_left edge case when cursor at/past line end
- wizard.rs: Minor formatting cleanup (rustfmt)
- Various Clippy backtick escaping in doc comments

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
